description: READ-WRITE access strictly limited to events/ and backups/ — the only two folders the app writes. NEVER add image-library paths to this scope; writes there are forbidden by claude.md #2. `fs:allow-rename` is required by the atomic-write pattern (write to .tmp → rename to final), per SOP 08 § Atomic Writes. `fs:allow-remove` is required for backup retention pruning (rolling 30) and is gated at the lib level so events/*.docx cannot be removed. Companion: capabilities/image-library.json. SOP: architecture/08-tauri-filesystem.md § Path Scopes #2. Each folder needs both the bare path (for readDir/mkdir) and the /** glob (for file ops inside).
